name: Pop Art
short_description: Painting has never been easier! Just relax and enjoy! In Paint by Numbers!
detailed_description:
Pop Art delivers an inspiring collection of beautiful art! So much more than a painting game, Pop Art brings a world of masterpieces to life! Simply select a color, find the corresponding number, and create a vibrant work of art with no clean-up required! Both challenging and relaxing, this color-by-numbers for the aspiring artist has it all!

Choose from tons of highly detailed works of art!
Bright and colorful images create a fun atmosphere to work your magic!
Zoom and pan around each image to find every numbered location!
